use_cases: Displaying job listings on a company careers page
Building a job board or recruitment platform
Creating a searchable job search interface
Showing job recommendations in a dashboard
Building a talent acquisition management system
ai_summary: A professional job listing card component with integrated company logos, job metadata display, and click interactions. Features Framer Motion animations for smooth transitions and hover effects. Supports custom job data through a flexible props interface with company info, salary, location, and remote/hybrid indicators. Ideal for building modern careers pages, job boards, or recruitment dashboards.
